title: psammogeton canescens subsp. canescens
intro: Psammogeton canescens subsp. canescens, also known as a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, is native to the Mediterranean region. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Psammogeton canescens subsp. canescens include teas and infusions made from its leaves and roots.
